examples: Know the difference between being feminine and being girly.
I don't really think you're a sissy. You're a little girly.
When you're around a woman you like, don't act like a GIRLY-MAN.
Alternatively, perhaps not cute, but girly- has it been stomped by a heavy-set woman in stilletto heels?
True spent the money to flesh out a song she had made up, pairing a hazy piano-based instrumental with girly, breathless vocals.
